name: Super Burger Clicker
short_description: Rebuild your burger empire in this clicker-idle hybrid! 🍔 Automate production with burger generators, collect items, unlock trophies, invest for hard currency, and spin the Wheel of Fortune. Boost production, hack the system, and reclaim your crown in this tasty adventure! 👑✨
detailed_description:
Super Burger Clicker
Rule the burger world with a click! 🍔👑

In Super Burger Clicker, play as the Burger King who’s out to reclaim his stolen crown. Combine the fast-paced fun of a clicker with idle mechanics to build your burger empire. Automate production with burger generators, collect powerful items, and unlock trophies as you climb your way to the top. Invest for hard currency, spin the Wheel of Fortune, claim daily rewards, and boost your production with strategic upgrades.

With an inventory system, 4 unique burgers, in-game combos, and even a hacking console to bend the rules, your journey to reclaim your crown is packed with flavor and fun. Are you ready to take back what’s yours?

Start clicking and let the empire rise! 🍔👑✨
